_publications._publicationTitle: Assessment of RAS Dependency for BRAF Alterations Using Cancer Genomic Databases.

_contextSnippet: large genomic database analysis using GENIE and cancer alteration databases in cBioPortal, 5767 cases harbored BRAF alterations, 3761 of which belong to class 1, 529 class 2, 651 class 3, and 282 BRAF fusions
details: Successfully identified 5,767 cases harboring BRAF alterations, with detailed classification into class 1 (3,761), class 2 (529), class 3 (651), and BRAF fusions (282)
